summary: Tested NEW Import Rilievo → Distinta Bridge feature. Backend APIs 100% functional - all dimension parsing patterns working (H=2200, WxH, standalone mm). Frontend split-screen dialog works perfectly with clickable dimension chips and Collega button.

tested_patterns.H=2200 style: PASS - Parsed correctly as H = 2200, value_mm: 2200, source: notes
tested_patterns.WxH pattern (1500x900): PASS - Split into H = 1500 and L = 900
tested_patterns.Sketch dimensions: PASS - altezza/larghezza from sketch.dimensions parsed correctly

GET /api/distinte/rilievo-data/{id}.response_structure: PASS - Returns rilievo_id, project_name, client_id, location, notes, sketches summary, dimensions array, dimension_count

POST /api/distinte/{id}/import-rilievo/{.auto_sets_client: PASS - Copies client_id from rilievo if distinta has no client
POST /api/distinte/{id}/import-rilievo/{.appends_reference_note: PASS - Adds 'Importato da rilievo: {project_name}' to notes

frontend.Import button visible: PASS - data-testid='btn-import-rilievo' present on saved distinta
frontend.Left panel (rilievo-panel): PASS - Shows project name, location, notes, sketches with dimensions
frontend.Dimension chips (dimensions-chips): PASS - 7 clickable chips rendered: H=2200, L=3000, H=1500, L=900, 2800mm, altezza=2200, larghezza=3000
frontend.Right panel (bom-target-panel): PASS - Shows BOM rows, supports row selection
frontend.Dimension chip click: PASS - Creates new BOM row with length_mm set to dimension value
frontend.Collega button: PASS - Links rilievo to distinta via POST API
frontend.Toast notifications: PASS - Shows success messages for dimension apply and rilievo linking

critical_code_review_comments: Dimension parsing regex patterns in distinta.py are well-designed and cover common Italian measurement notation
Frontend state management for dimension application is clean - properly handles both new row creation and existing row update
All data-testid attributes are properly placed for automated testing
Code follows existing patterns from the codebase

success_rate.backend: 100% (all dimension parsing patterns verified, all import APIs working)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (split-screen dialog, dimension chips, Collega button all functional)

test_credentials: Created temp test users via MongoDB (test-import-bridge-*), all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: None - all test data cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import Rilievo → Distinta Bridge feature fully tested. Key flows: 1) Open import dialog via 'Importa da Rilievo' button, 2) Select rilievo - split-screen shows left panel with rilievo data and parsed dimensions, right panel with BOM rows, 3) Click dimension chip to apply to BOM row, 4) Click 'Collega' to link rilievo to distinta. The rilievo-data endpoint parses 3 patterns: keyword=value (H=2200), WxH (1500x900), standalone mm (2800 mm). Import endpoint sets rilievo_id, client_id, and appends reference note.
